sourcesContent:
export const projects = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: 'Posteering',
    description:
      'Nigerian fintech platform for POS operator discovery, escrow transactions, and cash intelligence. Built for the underserved cash economy.',
    tags: ['React', 'TypeScript', 'Paystack', 'Supabase'],
    status: 'In Progress',
    link: null,
    nda: false,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: 'Confidential — E-Commerce Platform',
    description:
      'Full-stack e-commerce solution with advanced checkout flows, inventory management, and real-time analytics dashboard.',
    tags: ['Next.js', 'Node.js', 'PostgreSQL'],
    status: 'Shipped',
    link: null,
    nda: true,
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: 'Confidential — SaaS Dashboard',
    description:
      'B2B analytics platform with multi-tenant architecture, role-based access control, and custom data visualisations.',
    tags: ['React', 'Python', 'FastAPI', 'Redis'],
    status: 'Shipped',
    link: null,
    nda: true,
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: 'Confidential — Mobile App',
    description:
      'Cross-platform mobile application with offline-first architecture, push notifications, and seamless payment integration.',
    tags: ['React Native', 'Firebase', 'Stripe'],
    status: 'Shipped',
    link: null,
    nda: true,
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    title: 'Personal Portfolio v1',
    description:
      'Previous iteration of my portfolio site. Built with Next.js and Supabase — now superseded by what you\'re looking at.',
    tags: ['Next.js', 'Supabase', 'TailwindCSS'],
    status: 'Archived',
    link: 'https://heistheddy.github.io',
    nda: false,
  },
];

export const videoProjects = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: 'Confidential — Brand Campaign',
    description:
      'Full commercial production for a consumer brand — scripting, shoot direction, colour grading, and motion graphics.',
    tags: ['Premiere Pro', 'After Effects', 'DaVinci Resolve'],
    nda: true,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: 'Confidential — Documentary Short',
    description:
      'Short-form documentary edit with original score, multi-camera assembly, and festival delivery spec.',
    tags: ['DaVinci Resolve', 'Fairlight'],
    nda: true,
  },
];
